feat.name: Targeting Strike
feat.text: Your attack creates an opening in your target's defenses for your allies to capitalize on. When you successfully damage an opponent with either Guiding Shot or Set-Up Strike, the next creature other than you to attack the same target before the start of your next turn deals an amount of additional precision damage equal to your Intelligence modifier.

traits.name: Commander
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the commander class.
